account.title: Account
account.description: Your name, sign-in email, and password.
account.emailHint: Changing your email sends a confirmation link to the new address.
account.emailConfirmSent: Confirmation link sent — check your new inbox.
account.pwTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

verification.title: Verification status & history
verification.description: Your current tier, each policy track, and past decisions.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.description: Control who can see your profile and what you share.
privacy.visibilityHint: Who can find and view your profile.
privacy.enforcementNote: Saved now; visibility filtering across the feed, directory, and messages arrives in the next update.
privacy.showEmailHint: Let other members see your email.
privacy.showPhoneHint: Let other members see your phone number.
privacy.dataUsageHint: Allow anonymized usage to improve BridgeLink.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Theme and text size for this device.

theme.label: Theme
theme.hint: Light, dark, or match your system.

appearance.timezoneUsage: Event times will render in this zone.

devices.phoneDescription: Add a phone number for account recovery and alerts.
devices.codeHint: Enter the 6-digit code we texted you.
devices.smsProviderNote: SMS delivery depends on a configured provider; if none is set, sending will fail.
devices.appScaffold: The mobile app isn't available yet — pairing will activate here when it ships.

data.title: Download my data
data.description: Export a copy of your BridgeLink data.
data.downloadNote: Includes your profile, businesses, posts, messages you sent, RSVPs, itineraries, and verification records.

support.title: Support
support.body: Questions or trouble with your account? Reach the team and we'll help.
support.responseNote: We aim to respond within a couple of business days.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Permanently remove your account and data.
delete.warning: This deletes your profile, businesses, posts, and messages. It cannot be undone.
delete.confirmBody: This is permanent. Your profile and any businesses you own will be removed.

legal.draftNotice: This is a working draft being finalized ahead of launch.
legal.termsIntro: These Terms govern your use of BridgeLink, operated by {entity}. The full text is being prepared and will appear here before public launch.
legal.privacyIntro: This Policy explains how {entity} handles your data on BridgeLink. The full text is being prepared and will appear here before public launch.

topbar.assistantTooltip: The AI assistant arrives with the Utility phase

auth.joinSubtitle: The verified network of the US–Nepal corridor.
auth.browseHint: You can browse right away. Posting and messaging unlock once you verify your profile.

home.feedEmptyTitle: Quiet in the feed so far
home.feedEmptyBody: Verified members and businesses can post opportunities and updates here.
home.channelsEmptyBody: Sector channels appear here once seeded.
home.selectConversation: Select a conversation to read it here

composer.verifyToPost: Verify your profile to post to the feed.

directory.title: Members & Business
directory.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, business, or city

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Online and in-person gatherings across the corridor. RSVP so hosts can plan.
events.attendees: {count, plural, =0 {No RSVPs yet} one {# going} other {# going}}

channels.title: Channels
channels.subtitle: Each channel is a directory of registered businesses in that sector.
channels.detailSubtitle: Businesses in this sector will appear here once verified.

tripPlanner.title: Trip Planner
tripPlanner.body: Budget estimates, itinerary building, and recommendations tuned to Nepal are next after the community reaches critical mass. It will draw on what members share here — real operators, real prices, real routes.
tripPlanner.postHintPrefix: Planning a trip now? Post it in
tripPlanner.postHintSuffix: — members are already coordinating around each other's dates.
tripPlanner.recommendationsHint: Curated examples, not live vendor listings — ask in the directory for current operators.
tripPlanner.stagedEmpty: Add suggestions above, or they'll show up here once you do.
tripPlanner.titleRequired: Give your itinerary a name before saving.
tripPlanner.confirmDelete: Delete this itinerary? This can't be undone.
tripPlanner.bookingNotice: Booking and payments aren't available yet — save your plan and coordinate directly with members in the meantime.

businessNew.title: Your business
businessNew.subtitle: You verify as the owner; the entity is checked against its national registry in parallel — you're never blocked on paperwork.
businessNew.regNumberPlaceholder: PAN-VAT, EIN, or company no. — leave blank to join as Listed
businessNew.regNumberHint: Not required to join. Adding it earns the green "Verified Business" badge and unlocks charging for access below. Never shown to anyone — only the verification outcome is displayed.
businessNew.chargeFee: Charge an upfront fee to contact this business
businessNew.chargeFeeHintUnlocked: Common for service providers — legal, freelancers, outsourcing, advisory. Browsing your bio stays free; paying unlocks contacting you. The platform takes a revenue-share commission on each payment.
businessNew.chargeFeeHintLocked: Add a registration number above to unlock paid access — it requires Verified Business status.
businessNew.secondarySectorsHint: Select up to 2 more sectors this business also operates in.
businessNew.secondaryMaxReached: Maximum 2 secondary sectors — remove one to add another.

profile.title: Profile & settings
profile.verifiedBody: You can post and message across BridgeLink.
profile.notVerifiedBody: Verify to unlock posting and messaging.
profile.name: Name
profile.describeHint: Select every channel that fits — you can belong to more than one.

verify.submittedBody: Your document is under review. This is currently a placeholder pending the Shufti Pro integration — once wired, this step completes automatically.
verify.title: Verify your identity
verify.subtitle: Top-grade check, every country supported. Select your country — the right documents follow automatically.
verify.cameraError: Couldn't access the camera. Check your browser's camera permission and try again.
verify.footnote: Document, face match, and business/role checks — no manual bypass.
verify.bridgeExplainer: Bridge View requires both a passed US verification and a passed Nepal verification — they're separate regulatory tracks, not one combined check.
verify.trackSubmittedBody: This track is under review. This is currently a placeholder pending the Shufti Pro integration — once wired, this step completes automatically.

admin.adminsOnlyBody: This area is restricted. If you believe you should have access, ask an existing admin to grant it.
admin.title: Review queue
admin.trackRequired: Pick a sandbox (US or Nepal) before deciding.

business.payTooltip: Payment processing isn't wired up yet — coming with the Stripe integration
business.addMemberHint: Send an invite by email. They join verified under your responsibility — no separate ID check. You're accountable for who you invite.
business.inviteCreated: Invite created. Share this link with them:
business.inviteHint: They'll join your team automatically once they sign up with this link — no separate approval step needed.

onboarding.welcomeBody: The verified network of the US–Nepal corridor — business owners, investors, diplomats, and senior professionals. Three quick steps and you're set up. You can browse right away; verifying your profile later unlocks posting and messaging.
onboarding.profileSubtitle: This is how members recognize you. Real names work best here.
onboarding.describeSubtitle: Pick every channel that fits — you can belong to more than one, and change this later from your profile.
onboarding.guideline1: Be specific. Real asks and real offers — this is a working room, not a broadcast channel.
onboarding.guideline2: Vouch carefully. Every business you add to your team reflects on you as the owner.
onboarding.guideline3: Keep deals honest. Misrepresenting a business or listing gets one warning, then removal.
onboarding.guideline4: Respect both sides of the corridor. Two countries, one community.
onboarding.agree: I've read these and I'm in.
onboarding.inviteJoined: You've joined the team — check your profile's business page.
onboarding.inviteInvalid: That invite link is no longer valid. If you think this is a mistake, ask the business owner to resend it.

technology-ai.name: Technology & AI
technology-ai.description: Software development, artificial intelligence, digital products, IT services, SaaS, cybersecurity, and technology entrepreneurship connecting the US and Nepal.

energy-hydropower.name: Energy & Hydropower
energy-hydropower.description: Hydropower development, renewable energy, power infrastructure, and energy-related investment and project development.

investment-finance.name: Investment & Finance
investment-finance.description: Venture capital, private equity, banking, fintech, diaspora investment, fund management, and capital markets activity.

innovation-rd.name: Innovation & R&D
innovation-rd.description: Research and development, deep technology, product development, strategic innovation, fundraising, mergers & acquisitions, go-to-market work, and national-interest collaboration between the US and Nepal.

tourism-hospitality.name: Tourism & Hospitality
tourism-hospitality.description: Travel, hospitality, adventure tourism, wellness, hotels, and experience-based businesses.

healthcare-life-sciences.name: Healthcare & Life Sciences
healthcare-life-sciences.description: Healthcare delivery, biotechnology, medical devices, pharmaceuticals, diagnostics, and digital health.

agriculture-food-systems.name: Agriculture & Food Systems
agriculture-food-systems.description: Agribusiness, food processing, sustainable agriculture, and value-added agricultural products.

infrastructure-logistics.name: Infrastructure & Logistics
infrastructure-logistics.description: Infrastructure development, construction, transportation, supply chain, and logistics services.

education-human-capital.name: Education & Human Capital
education-human-capital.description: Educational institutions, edtech, professional training, skills development, and talent pipeline initiatives.

manufacturing-industry.name: Manufacturing & Industry
manufacturing-industry.description: Light manufacturing, industrial production, export-oriented manufacturing, and related activities.

policy-immigration-legal.name: Policy, Immigration & Legal
policy-immigration-legal.description: Public policy, government relations, diplomacy, immigration services, legal practice, regulatory affairs, and compliance work relevant to the US–Nepal corridor. Includes immigration lawyers, consultants, and professionals helping with visas, cross-border movement, and legal frameworks.

media-creative-industries.name: Media & Creative Industries
media-creative-industries.description: Journalism, media platforms, content creation, branding, storytelling, and creative industries.

real-estate-home-improvement.name: Real Estate & Home Improvement
real-estate-home-improvement.description: Real estate agents and brokers, property investment in the US and Nepal, diaspora property purchases (NRN rules), home improvement contractors, construction trades, and related licensed services.

retail-consumer.name: Retail & Consumer
retail-consumer.description: Retail shops, consumer goods, trading businesses, and local commerce.

food-beverage.name: Food & Beverage
food-beverage.description: Restaurants, cafes, food production, catering, and F&B businesses.
